name: Terraform Latest + AWS
postCreateCommand: wget -q https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.15.7/terraform_1.15.7_linux_amd64.zip && unzip terraform_*_linux_amd64.zip && sudo mv terraform /usr/local/bin/ && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/terraform && rm terraform_*_linux_amd64.zip && terraform version
